content: You will be redirected to the {{sectionName}} automatically in 5 seconds.

comment.text: This is a message displayed to the user when they are being redirected to another section of the application. It informs them that the redirection will happen automatically in 5 seconds. The `{{sectionName}}` variable will be replaced with the name of the section the user is being redirected to (e.g., "Rooms").
